description: CompositionBlue and black shoe made of synthetic leather with multi-directional, non-marking rubber outsole coupled with metal drainage meshWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washMade specifically for heavy duty outdoor activities, especially tasks involving walking along on damp areas, these sandals from adidas are made of durable material that can also withstand water-based activities. It’s an ideal wear when indulging in water Sports like kayaking as the water drains away from the insole through the metal drainage mesh on the outsole. Thye non-marking, multi-dimensional outsole ensures ample grip and support even on wet surfaces.
